title: The Magic Paint Brush
content:
A poor boy named Ma Liang loved to draw more than anything in the world. He drew on the dirt with sticks and on rocks with chalk. He could not afford real brushes, but he never stopped drawing.

One night, a kind old man appeared in his dream and placed a gleaming golden paintbrush in his hands. When Ma Liang woke up, the paintbrush was real, right there in his hand!

He painted a bird and the bird flew away singing! He painted a fish and it leaped into the river with a splash! Whatever Ma Liang painted came to life!

Ma Liang used the brush to help the poor people of his village. He painted cows for farmers who had none and painted grain for families who were hungry. Everyone was grateful and kind to him.

But a greedy king heard about the magic brush and had Ma Liang brought to the palace. The king ordered him to paint a mountain of gold rising from the sea. Ma Liang obeyed and painted a wide sea and a distant island of gold.

The greedy king jumped on a ship to reach the gold. Ma Liang then painted a strong wind. The waves grew wild and tall. The king's ship was lost at sea. Ma Liang went home and used his brush only for good people from that day on.

author: Traditional
